Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/slow_life_deploy_20260210_154824 root@47.94.229.233 "
# Create network
docker network create umami-net 2>/dev/null || true

# Start PostgreSQL
docker run -d --name umami-db \\
  --network umami-net \\
  -e POSTGRES_DB=umami \\
  -e POSTGRES_USER=umami \\
  -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=umami \\
  -v umami-db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data \\
  --restart always \\
  postgres:15-alpine

echo 'Waiting for DB...'
sleep 10

# Start Umami
docker run -d --name umami \\
  --network umami-net \\
  -p 3000:3000 \\
  -e DATABASE_URL=postgresql://umami:umami@umami-db:5432/umami \\
  -e APP_SECRET=06d14a6c9ad6d7d2cfb5fa8e0f60bb6fab73b2d4a3e918399c11deff6ce0665f \\
  -e BASE_PATH=/umami \\
  --restart always \\
  ghcr.io/umami-software/umami:postgresql-latest

echo 'Containers started'
" 2>&1)

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/slow_life_deploy_20260210_154824 root@47.94.229.233 "
# Remove failed db container
docker rm -f umami-db 2>/dev/null || true

# Configure Alibaba Cloud mirror
mkdir -p /etc/docker
cat > /etc/docker/daemon.json << 'EOF'
{
  \\"registry-mirrors\\": [\\"https://registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com\\"]
}
EOF
systemctl restart docker

# Wait for docker to restart
sleep 3

# Pull and start PostgreSQL
docker run -d --name umami-db \\
  --network umami-net \\
  -e POSTGRES_DB=umami \\
  -e POSTGRES_USER=umami \\
  -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=umami \\
  -v umami-db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data \\
  --restart always \\
  postgres:15-alpine

echo 'DB started, waiting...'
sleep 15

# Restart umami to connect to db
docker restart umami
sleep 10

# Verify
docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}'
curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'umami: %{http_code}' http://localhost:3000/umami/
" 2>&1)
